description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic blue airplane with a twin-fuselage design and sharply swept wings, giving it an aggressive, high-speed appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and feature angular, pointed tips, while the body is adorned with metallic and silver accents, as well as visible panel lines and intakes. The airplane has two prominent jet engines mounted at the rear of each fuselage, with gold and black detailing around the exhausts. The cockpit is centrally located between the fuselages, enclosed with a clear canopy and flanked by angular, armored panels. The tail section features twin vertical stabilizers, each rising from the end of the fuselages, and the undercarriage does not show visible landing gear, suggesting a retractable or stylized design. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of advanced military or sci-fi aircraft, with a focus on speed and maneuverability.
description: A futuristic blue twin-fuselage airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, dual rear jet engines, and a central enclosed cockpit. The design features angular lines, metallic accents, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin fuselages, central cockpit, and the wide, sharply swept wings with pointed tips.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the dual jet engines, angular wing structure, and metallic panel details along the fuselage.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, twin fuselage layout, and the symmetrical placement of the engines and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the rear jet exhausts, wing geometry, and the streamlined, aerodynamic body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pointed tips, no visible winglets, and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear of each fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers, each mounted at the end of the fuselages, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Central, forward-mounted enclosed cockpit between the twin fuselages, likely single or dual-seat with a clear canopy.
